evidence_boundary: Phase 2 implements hub-mediated seeded context for PICIS, LIS, PACS/RIS, pharmacy-system, blood-transfusion, de-identified HMIS measures, and a signed LIS critical-result alert with explicit nurse acknowledgement. Clinical release remains gated by human safety, privacy, security, and deployment approvals.

clinical_governance.two_key_policy: Agent assurance prepares and recommends; a human approves the identical scope. Neither key can authorise alone.

prohibited: shared development ports when a dedicated allocation is required

workspace_cascade.runtime_policy: Backend, Vite, Playwright, docs, and launch tooling must resolve ports from the workspace registry or an explicit test override; no literal fallback is permitted.
workspace_cascade.phase_boundary: Phase 2 interface rows must match implemented BulletTrain manifests, direct source tests, the real seeded journey, and generated topology. Future CAID work must reuse these allocations and may not create alternate listeners.
